para.p: Opening paragraph before refs with marker [*]. 1 1 footnote 1 Paragraph note one.

Inline math
+ a b
and display
. caption-like text: Figure caption: not a real caption.

repeated markers [*] [*] near real notes. refs to table and section . Closing paragraph after cross-references.
